message.content: The image provided does not show a "Contact section" or a "CRT/terminal glitch effect" (orange/ember pixelated glyphs) behind text. Instead, it displays a light - colored webpage with a navigation bar (containing "WORK", "ABOUT", "CONTACT", "GET IN TOUCH"), a name ("John Shannon"), stylized orange text ("Hour iguez"), an image of a person in a white shirt, and a "SCROLL TO READ" prompt. There is no visible glitch effect, dark mode styling, or contact - specific content in the image. Therefore, the visibility of the glitch effect cannot be assessed from this image.
